ats.title: ATS Resume Optimisation
ats.description: Get past automated filters with keyword-optimized resumes that score 90%+ on ATS scans.

coverLetter.title: Strategic Cover Letter
coverLetter.description: Tailored cover letters that connect your experience to the role's core requirements.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn Repositioning
linkedin.description: Transform your LinkedIn profile to attract recruiters and showcase your executive brand.

interview.title: Interview Preparation
interview.description: AI-powered mock interviews with real-time feedback and question prediction.

translation.title: Translation / I18n
translation.description: Professional bilingual resume and cover letter translation (EN/FR).

prioritySupport.title: Priority Support
prioritySupport.description: 24/7 dedicated support with response times under 2 hours.

bilingual.question: Do you support English and French?
bilingual.answer: Yes. All deliverables are natively produced in English and French by bilingual executive editors. Toggle the language switcher in the navbar.

mobile.question: Is this homepage mobile optimized?
mobile.answer: Yes. Every component is responsive across breakpoints, from 320px mobile to 4K desktop.

gettingStarted.question: How do I get started?
gettingStarted.answer: Click 'Start Free Assessment' on the hero. Upload your current resume, and receive a diagnostic within 24 hours.
